The automated weekly check (`tools/maintain.py --links`) found something that needs a look — a broken JSON file, a missing cross-reference, or a dead external link.

```
{{ env.REPORT }}
```

This issue is reused automatically each week until it's clean, so you'll only see one open at a time. Fix the item(s) above, commit, and close this — if next week's run is clean, no new issue opens.
